concept: Tell / To Narrate a Whole Story
description: The act of narrating a story or conveying a sequence of information. It implies a more structured and complete form of communication than simply saying something.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'tho' (a whole system, a context) and 'ma' (grounded presence). The word's structure means 'to make a whole system present' or 'to ground a complete context.' This perfectly captures the act of telling a story, which involves bringing a whole narrative world into the present moment for the listener.
